# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: AI Assistant Enhancements & Secure Sign-In
- Summary: Highlight the new AI assistant capabilities and Google authentication integration that streamline problem-solving and secure user access.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-security-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-security-updates
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-18-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-security-updates.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now ships an enhanced Azure OpenAI-powered AI assistant and Google authentication integration, improving problem-solving guidance, model-switching during chats, and a streamlined, secure sign-in flow for faster onboarding and a smoother learning experience.
- CTA: Try the updated AI assistant in a new problem and log in with Google to experience the streamlined onboarding.
- Visual brief: A short 30-45s demo video showing: (1) user initiating a LeetCode-style problem, (2) AI assistant providing step-by-step guidance with model-switching, (3) clicking 'Sign in with Google' and a quick profile sync, (4) subtle UI cues of secure OAuth flow and real-time problem-solving tips.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
